_meta.note: Federal CA batch — Carbajal (CA-24 D sitting, ran 2026, won primary 52.5%), Ruiz (CA-25 D sitting, ER physician), Brownley (CA-26 D retiring lame_duck, status fix + score on 7-term record), Espinosa (CA-26 D LOST primary 4th 8.6%, status fix + Gaza cross-party catch), Paytas (CA-26 R phantom candidacy — never filed, Wikipedia confirms party unknown, BallotReady confirms 9 filed candidates, none Paytas — strip R + status=former).

set.office: US Representative · CA-24 (sitting · won 2026 D primary 52.5%, faces Bob Smith R in Nov 3 general)

profile.background: Former Marine Reserve · House Agriculture + Armed Services · New Dem Coalition · sitting since 2017 · Heritage Action lifetime 0-2%

salud-carbajal.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. CA-coastal D archetype with TWO narrow cross-party partial-catches: (1) BORDER Q3 E-Verify TRUE — lead sponsor of bipartisan Dignity Act of 2025 which includes mandatory E-Verify; (2) FOREIGN POLICY Q0 Article I war-powers TRUE — Yemen WPR + Iraq AUMF repeal cosponsor. HEADLINE FALSE: AUTHOR of federal Extreme Risk Protection Order Act (red-flag law) signed into Bipartisan Safer Communities Act — 2A author-tier FALSE. AIPAC $50,945 → FP Q3 FALSE. WHPA + Roe-codify + EMILY's List endorse + PP roundtable → SOL FALSE. RFMA YES → BM FALSE. 'Vehemently opposed' FY25 NDAA trans-care ban for minor dependents → BM Q2 + FCS Q1 FALSE. HR1 cosponsor → EI FALSE. Marine vet but no Pentagon-audit-leadership signature, no anti-CBDC, no BBA support. Won 2026 primary 52.5%, advanced to Nov general vs Bob Smith (R).

raul-ruiz.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. ZERO cross-party deviations — textbook progressive D physician-legislator. HEADLINE FALSE: HARD-FALSE on Industry Capture Q0 — ER doctor who personally vaccinated constituents, led bipartisan booster PSA, ranking member House COVID Select Subcommittee (the 'physician dissent / informed-consent restraint' hypothesis fails). AIPAC-funded $73,717 (2023-24 cycle) → FP Q3 FALSE. RFMA + Tri-Caucus co-lead + Equality Caucus → Marriage all FALSE. Voted NO on HR5 Parents Bill of Rights → Family Q1/Q2 FALSE. SBA Pro-Life F + Planned Parenthood Action Fund-endorsed → SOL FALSE. Bipartisan Safer Communities Act YES → 2A FALSE. CHC chair posture on border → Border FALSE. HR1 cosponsor → Election Integrity FALSE. SDA religious background but no public Christian witness in office located. /100 = 0.

julia-brownley.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. RETIRING — Politico-confirmed announcement 1/8/2026 (status=lame_duck, candidacy_status=not_running, NOT on June 2026 primary ballot — open-seat primary won by Irwin D + Gallucci R). Scored on 7-term voting record. ONE cross-party catch: FP Q0 Article I war-powers TRUE (voted YES on H.Con.Res.38 terminating Iran hostilities; publicly called Trump Iran strikes 'blatant violation of the Constitution'). HEADLINE FALSE cluster: AIPAC $193,978 LIFETIME → FP Q3 HARD-FALSE. Joined Congressional Freethought Caucus 2022 → CL Q0+Q3 FALSE (self-IDed with secular caucus despite Episcopal registry, signed FFRF letter for strict church-state separation). RFMA YES + Transgender Bill of Rights cosponsor → Marriage all FALSE. HR5 NO → Family Q1/Q2 FALSE. AWB applause + BSCA YES + Giffords-aligned → 2A FALSE. HR1 author of two provisions (same-day registration + against 'discriminatory voter ID') → EI FALSE. Laken Riley NO + DC-sanctuary-override NO → Border FALSE. SBA Pro-Life F + EMILY/PP endorsed → SOL FALSE.

set.office: Former 2026 D Candidate · U.S. Representative CA-26 (LOST primary 6/2/2026 — 4th place 8.6%; did not advance; ex-Grijalva Natural Resources staffer · Earthjustice Legislative Director Climate & Energy)

profile.background: Santa Paula native · senior staff House Natural Resources Committee under Chairman Raúl Grijalva (climate/EJ portfolio) · Earthjustice Legislative Director Climate & Energy · DSA Ventura County endorsement-interview stage · LOST 2026 CA-26 D primary 4th place (8.6%) to Jacqui Irwin (40.7%)

chris-espinosa.notes_set: LOST 2026 CA-26 D primary 6/2/2026 — 4th place (8.6%, 11,548 votes) per CA SoS; did not advance. Open seat (Brownley retiring); top-two advanced: Irwin D + Gallucci R. Status fix is the high-value win. Documented positions from his campaign Issues page captured before exit: HARD-FALSE cluster on abolish-ICE + Roe-codify + IVF-protect + gender-affirming-care + LGBTQ-pride; explicit FALSE on EI Q1 — 'opposes the SAVE Act' (documentary citizenship for voter reg). ONE cross-party HARD-TRUE catch: FP Q2 — 'opposes providing weapons to Israel until it demonstrates compliance with international humanitarian law' + 'What is happening in Gaza is a genocide' + 'immediate and permanent ceasefire.' Pairs with overnight cluster (Villegas CA-22, Lewis George DC W4, Khanna, Lofgren, Panetta — Grijalva-progressive Israel bloc). MOOT going forward — candidate not advancing — but evidence logged for the record.

set.office: PHANTOM 2026 CA-26 U.S. Representative bid (NEVER FILED with CA SoS · Jan 2026 YouTube/TMZ exploratory comments only · not on 6/2/2026 primary ballot · party tag stripped — Wikipedia: party unknown)

profile.background: YouTube/social-media personality (b. May 8, 1988) · CA-26 resident · Jan 2026 exploratory talk only ('I really would love to run for House of Representatives' — gave self until 2/9/2026 to gather signatures) · did NOT file · BallotReady + Vida Newspaper confirm 9 candidates filed for CA-26 primary, none Paytas · Wikipedia confirms 'it is unknown which party she will be running under'
profile.confidence_note: PHANTOM-CANDIDACY ingest artifact — Jan 2026 YouTube/TMZ/Hill exploratory comments only; never filed with CA SoS; not on June 2 2026 CA-26 primary ballot per BallotReady candidate list and Vida Newspaper results (9 candidates total: Espinosa D, Hernandez D, Irwin D, Kacker D, Samadzadeh D, Gallucci R, Koslow R, Miller R, Scott R — none Paytas). The 'R' party tag in the prior record was unsupported — Wikipedia explicitly notes party affiliation unknown. Recommend retaining row at low_evidence with phantom-candidacy note for audit trail; not a scoreable candidate.

trisha-paytas.notes_set: PHANTOM-CANDIDACY artifact 2026-06-05. Trisha Kay Paytas (b. May 8, 1988) — YouTube/social-media personality, CA-26 resident — made Jan 2026 exploratory comments about running for Congress ('I really would love to run for House of Representatives' per The Hill 1/9/2026; TMZ 1/6/2026 'Trisha Paytas Says She Wants to Run for Congress in California'; gave self until 2/9/2026 to gather signatures). NEVER FILED with CA SoS. NOT on the 6/2/2026 CA-26 primary ballot — BallotReady official candidate list shows 9 filed candidates (Espinosa D, Hernandez D, Irwin D, Kacker D, Samadzadeh D, Gallucci R, Koslow R, Miller R, Scott R); Vida Newspaper June 3 2026 results confirm Irwin (40.74%) and Gallucci (22.09%) advanced. The 'R' party tag in prior record was UNSUPPORTED — Wikipedia explicitly notes 'it is unknown which party she will be running under.' Stripped R → party=Unknown. Set status=former + candidacy_status=not_running. Compare to 'vacant-ca-14 placeholder skip' and 'mike-thompson 11th-defer slug-collision blocker' overnight class of cleanup. No federal-rubric scoring applied (reset_unspecified clears any prior speculative party-default scores to null).
